title: Writing a recursive logic prompt for a logic puzzle
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a recursive logic puzzle with 5 levels of recursion. The puzzle should include 10 nodes and 15 edges, with each node represented by a unique symbol and each edge represented by a different character. The prompt should use a formal tone and be under 250 words.
constraints: Must use a combination of symbols and characters to represent nodes and edges
Must be a recursive logic puzzle with 5 levels of recursion
Must include a clear explanation of the puzzle rules

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt accurately represent a recursive logic puzzle with 5 levels of recursion?
Does the prompt accurately implement the recursive structure?
Are the puzzle rules clear and easy to understand?
Does the prompt accurately implement the specified constraints?
